entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Combat Rogue DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: If you are hitting two targets with Blade Flurry, you should always do Eviscerate, as it will hit both targets, while Rupture does not.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Combat Rogue DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: If your target already has your Rupture active, you should not overwrite the old one. If you can, wait until the previous Rupture expires; otherwise, use Eviscerate.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Combat Rogue DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: If your target will not live for the full duration of Rupture, then you should use Eviscerate.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Combat Rogue DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: If your target will live for the full duration, Rupture is the superior choice.

entries.text: Racial abilities like Arcane Torrent , Blood Fury , or Berserking .

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Combat Rogue DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Be sure to level First Aid. This will provide excellent healing for yourself. Since Rogues rely on energy and not mana, having low health is the only thing that would slow them down and prevent Rogues from engaging the next enemy.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Combat Rogue DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Be sure to use your defensive cooldowns like Evasion when fighting multiple enemies. If you think you still won't make it, Vanish ! Avoiding death is very important while leveling, since dying costs a lot of time returning to your corpse.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Combat Rogue DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: As you level up, you will gain access to stronger gear and stronger quest rewards. Don't stick around running a low-level dungeon hunting for a specific drop; just move on with the leveling process, and you are likely to find something else along the way.
